name: Kinetic energy formula
task: Create /tmp/eval_ke/ke.py with kinetic_energy(mass, velocity) returning 0.5 * m * v^2.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_ke/ke.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); K = mod.kinetic_energy; assert abs(K(2,3) - 9) < 1e-9; assert K(0,100) == 0; assert abs(K(1,10) - 50) < 1e-9; print('OK')
